productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys Core Blue T-shirt
description: Style Note Get your little one ready for a trip out in this T-shirt from Gini and Jony. The print on the front adds to the cool vibe, while the cotton fabric keeps him feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with shorts and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with his pals. Product Details Blue T-shirt, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the front Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron; Do not iron directly on print/embroidery
